transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-14]
[00:00] You: Cross-functional product review for the Q3 roadmap. We have product, engineering, design, data, marketing, and support all here today.
[00:55] Speaker 1: Product perspective: the three Q3 priorities are search improvements, notifications v2, and the mobile onboarding flow. All three are in the plan.
[01:40] Speaker 2: Engineering estimate for search is 6 weeks. I'll have a detailed technical spec ready by July 21st.
[02:20] Speaker 3: Design needs 2 weeks for the notifications v2 designs. I'll deliver final mockups by July 28th.
[03:00] Speaker 4: Data — we'll need new event tracking for search. I'll define the event schema and share it with engineering by July 18th.
[03:35] Speaker 5: Marketing — I'll update the product page to reflect the new search capabilities once specs are final. I'll have copy ready within a week of receiving the spec.
[04:10] Speaker 6: Support team — we're seeing 40 tickets a week about notification settings. I'll write a help article for the current behavior to reduce ticket volume. I'll publish it by July 17th.
[04:50] You: Thank you. One cross-team item: we need a shared definition of 'active user' for the Q3 metrics dashboard. Speaker 4 and Speaker 1, can you align on that?
[05:10] Speaker 4: I'll draft the 'active user' definition and share with Speaker 1 by July 16th.
[05:35] Speaker 1: I'll review and confirm by July 18th.
[06:00] Speaker 3: I also want to flag that the mobile onboarding flow redesign is dependent on the new brand guidelines from Speaker 3. I'll share the brand guidelines doc with Speaker 2 by July 15th.
[06:30] You: Good. The Q3 scope lock is July 25th — no new items after that.
